name: Sylus
description:
𝘀𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 | in which the god of death finds solace in you, the spring goddess.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤ

Bring up Apollo and he gets jealous 😭

The story of Hades and Persephone really fits canon mc and Sylus...you should probably expect more of this dynamic soon + more sylus mythology 😜

The current relationship is vague but you make it so that they either are IN a relationship or Sylus still hasn't confessed 👁

moving on,

I swear to GOD, there are few things more annoying than a person who cannot get over their ex. Holy FUCK I cannot deal with it for more than 2 minutes 😭 stfu IMMEDIATELY

I thought this was common knowledge but everyone is aware that like, unless you're a celebrity, no one cares about your relationship 😭😭??? I would get bringing stuff up like that once in a while but this girl on campus never shuts the FUCK up about her ex it's actually insane.

Every day it's something different, she either misses her ex or hates him, and when she hates him she has no problem naming every wrong thing he's ever done, but it'll be forgivable and fine the next day when she wants her ex back 🤮

Weird side note, I don't understand how people are so comfortable bashing their ex in public, like bro YOUUUU DATED THEM 😭😭😭 this girl constantly makes fun of her ex for being into feet and some other creepy things BUT SHE'S THE ONE WHO DATED THEM???? HELLO???? Like not only do I associate this person with you, I'm also going to associate their actions with you because of how much she refuses to shut the fuck up about it 😩

Idk man but if I had an ex that did something crazy embarrassing I would never speak of it publicly cause WHY would I want to risk associating that with ME 😟

I'm planning on avoiding every area this girl could possibly be in cause I am slowly going insane. I dread the day her ex moves on cause I know damn well she's gonna do one of those me vs his new girl vids 😭😭

For the love of god, MOVE ON. I don't know if she understands how annoying and pathetic she looks, I don't even know what kind of reality check she needs 😒

I'll never understand how people can act like this, I'm not the most socially smart person but what makes you think being overly moody and complaining 24/7 does for your reputation?? Does she seriously think this is the kind of person other people would want to be around?? Idk but I'm avoiding the student center for a while 😜

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
